sections.sectionTitle: Job in Pasian A Dawn' Theihlohna

verses.text: Tua ciangin Job in Pasian dawng a
“Kuamah in Pasian a zawhzawh lohna a teltakin ka theita hi
Mi khatpeuh Pasian tawh thu a kinial ding hi leh tul khat sungah khatvei nangawn dawng theilo ding hi
Amah pil mahmah a, vanglian mahmah hi. Kua in khauhtakin nial a, nial paisuakzo ahi hiam
Pasian in mualte lingsak a, tawlngasak lo hi. Ama hehna tawh mualte a lumlet hi
Amah in leitung lokgawp a, a khuampite kiling hi
Amah in ni a suaklo dingin thu pia a, aksite sincip hi
Amah bek in vanpi zal a, tuipi tuihualte tuancil hi
Amah pen vana a om Khawlei-uikai, Zawlzawng, Seguk, leh Khanglam aksite a bawlpa ahi hi
Amah in kuama theih zawhloh na lian tampi bawl a, kuama simzawhloh na lamdang tampi sem hi
“Ka kiangah amah hong pai a, ke'n amah ka mu thei kei hi. Amah gamtangtang napi-in, amah ka theithei kei hi
Amah in lakhia nuam leh a khaktanzo ding kua om ahi hiam? Bang hih na hi hiam, kua'n ci thei ding ahi hiam
Pasian in ama hehna dokkik hetlo mah ding hi. Rahab' pawlte nangawn a khenuai-ah kun uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin keimah in bangci dawn' theih ding a, amah ka nialna ding kammal bangci muh ding ka hi hiam
Kei ka dik hangin amah ka dawng thei kei hi. Kei hong mawhsakpa tungah hong hehpih ding ka nget kul hi
Thukhen zumah amah samin hong pai hita mah leh zong ka thumna hong ngai dingin ka um tuan kei hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh thu themno khat hangin nakpi takin kei hong hih a, thu omlopi-in gimna tampi hong thuaksak hi
Ka hu nangawn hong sangsak manlo a, lungkhamna tawh kei hong kidimsak hi
Thatanghat thu ding hi leh, amah hat mahmah a, thutang kituh hi leng, kua in thukhen zumah amah samzo ding ahi hiam
Kei ka dik hangin keima kam mah siksanin kei hong man ding a, mawhbaanglo ka hih hangin keima kampau hong lehheisak ding hi
Paubaan'na ka neihloh hangin kei a thupi-in ka kingaihsun tuan het kei a, ka nuntakna ka kih hi
Thu khat bek om hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in a paubaanglote leh a gilote susia khawm hi, ka ci hi
Lauhuai lianpi hong tung pakin sihna a om ciangin mawhbaanglote' thumna a nuihsan lel hi
Migilote' khutsungah leitung kipia a, amah in thukhen mangte' mit a tuncipsak hi — amah hi kei leh kua hi ding ahi hiam
“Laitaite sangin ka hun nawhtai zaw a, beipak ahih manin nopna ngah khalo hi
Pumpeeng gunkuang bangin ka hun nawhpai a, muvanlai sa bawh bangin a nawhlen' hi
Ka dahnate kimangngilh bawlin kimaitaisak ding ci ta leng zong
a dikin nong sehloh ding lamtak thei khin ka hih manin ka thuak ding thute hangin kei ka lau mahmah hi
Kei a mawhin hong kiseh veve ding ahih leh bang hangin a mawkna-in na sem ding ka hi hiam
Satpiang tawh kei kisilin, vuttui tawh ka khut sawp ta leng
buannawng sungah kei nong hencip veve ding a, ka puan ninte in a kihhuai hong suaksak ding hi
Amah ka dawn' theihna dingin amah, kei bangin mi hilo a, thukhen zumah thu kineihpih theih hilo hi
Kote gel kikalah thu hong khen ding khat om thei hen la, kote gel tungah aana hong zang ding khat om thei hi leh
kei hong kisatna ciang hong paih khiatsak ding a, kei tungah lauhuaina lianpite hong om nawnlo ding hi
Bangbang ahi zongin amah kihta hetloin ka pau ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh kei' omzia ding bangin kei ka omloh lamtak teltakin ka kithei hi.
